name: CrowdStrike Falcon Sandbox
description: Automated malware analysis service powered by Hybrid Analysis, providing deep file and URL detonation with behavioral analysis, network traffic inspection, and threat intelligence enrichment

actions.name: Submit File
actions.description: Submit a file for sandbox analysis in a specified environment

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: The file to submit for analysis (multipart form data)

parameters.name: environment_id
parameters.description: Environment ID for analysis (e.g., 300=Linux, 100=Windows 7 32-bit, 110=Windows 7 64-bit, 120=Windows 10 64-bit)

parameters.name: no_share_third_party
parameters.description: When true, the file will not be shared with any third party

parameters.name: allow_community_access
parameters.description: When true, the file and results will be shared with the community

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Optional comment for the submission

parameters.name: custom_date_time_stamp
parameters.description: Custom date/time stamp for the sandbox clock

parameters.name: submit_name
parameters.description: Optional custom filename for the submission

parameters.name: action_script
parameters.description: Runtime script to apply during analysis (e.g., default, default_randomfiles, default_openie)

actions.name: Submit URL
actions.description: Submit a URL or file URL for sandbox analysis

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: URL to analyze (website or direct file link)

parameters.name: environment_id
parameters.description: Environment ID for analysis (e.g., 120=Windows 10 64-bit, 300=Linux)

parameters.name: no_share_third_party
parameters.description: When true, the URL and results will not be shared with any third party

parameters.name: allow_community_access
parameters.description: When true, the URL and results will be shared with the community

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Optional comment for the submission

actions.name: Submit Dropped File
actions.description: Submit an extracted/dropped file from a previous report for re-analysis

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Report ID from which to extract the dropped file (format: jobId or sha256:environmentId)

parameters.name: file_hash
parameters.description: SHA256 hash of the dropped file to submit

parameters.name: environment_id
parameters.description: Environment ID for the new analysis

actions.name: Search Hash
actions.description: Convert any hash format (MD5, SHA1, SHA256, SHA512) to SHA256 and return matching results

parameters.name: hash
parameters.description: File hash to search (MD5, SHA1, SHA256, or SHA512)

actions.name: Search Terms
actions.description: Search the Falcon Sandbox database using various search terms and filters

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: Filter by filename (e.g., invoice.exe)

parameters.name: filetype_desc
parameters.description: Filter by file type description (e.g., PE32 executable)

parameters.name: verdict
parameters.description: Filter by verdict (1=whitelisted, 2=no specific threat, 3=no verdict, 4=suspicious, 5=malicious)

parameters.name: av_detect
parameters.description: AV multiscan detection percentage range (e.g., 50-100)

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: Filter by contacted host IP address

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Filter by contacted domain

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: Filter by HTTP request URL substring

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: Filter by hashtag (e.g., ransomware)

parameters.name: similar_to
parameters.description: Filter by similar samples SHA256

parameters.name: imphash
parameters.description: Filter by import hash

actions.name: Get Overview
actions.description: Return aggregated overview for a SHA256 hash including all available reports and verdicts

parameters.name: sha256
parameters.description: SHA256 hash to get the overview for

actions.name: Get Overview Summary
actions.description: Return a condensed overview summary for a SHA256 hash

parameters.name: sha256
parameters.description: SHA256 hash to get the summary for

actions.name: Get Report Summary
actions.description: Retrieve the summary of a specific sandbox analysis report

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Report ID (format: jobId or sha256:environmentId)

actions.name: Get Report State
actions.description: Return the processing state of a sandbox submission

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Report ID (format: jobId or sha256:environmentId)

actions.name: Download Sample
actions.description: Download the original sample file from a SHA256 overview

parameters.name: sha256
parameters.description: SHA256 hash of the sample to download

actions.name: Quick Scan File
actions.description: Submit a file for quick multi-engine scan without full sandbox detonation

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: The file to scan (multipart form data)

parameters.name: scan_type
parameters.description: Type of scan to perform (e.g., all, lookup_ha, lookup_intezer)

actions.name: Quick Scan URL
actions.description: Submit a URL for quick multi-engine scan without full sandbox detonation

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: URL to scan

parameters.name: scan_type
parameters.description: Type of scan to perform

actions.name: Get Quick Scan Results
actions.description: Retrieve results of a previously submitted quick scan

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Quick scan ID returned from the submission
